programme.title: Into the Badlands

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta en la casa continua y la discusión entre Chile y Diego tiene un desenlace inesperado. Isa toma una decisión que lamentará y un nuevo integrante se une a la familia shore aunque su bienvenida no será la mejor.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La paz y la armonía reinan, y el jefe visita al grupo. Fernanda aparece, pero ignora a "Matryoshka". Carlos vive cinco minutos inolvidables, mientras Karime organiza una cita romántica que podría salir mal.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La cita de Karime y Fernanda da un giro inesperado, y el grupo se dirige a una fiesta. Un visitante causa sensación, y Jacky lo invita a la casa, pero los chicos se sienten incómodos y quieren sacarlo.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Rocío se une al grupo con ganas de venganza. Santiago y Alba sorprenden a todos con una ceremonia poliamorosa. Diego no puede controlar su bebida y su forma de festejar le pasa factura.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta sigue, pero Diego toma una decisión sorprendente. Jaylín se une al grupo y, mientras su bienvenida se descontrola, Karime organiza la primera iniciación en la casa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La iniciación de Alba concluye con éxito, pero Jacky aprovecha a Altafulla para incomodarla. Una nueva invitada llega a la casa y Carlos queda cautivado por su encanto, mientras que José y Beni se enfrentan por la atención de Karime.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los conflictos entre Alba y Altafulla se intensifican. Chile y Beni compiten por llevar a una invitada al despacho. Jacky, tras pasarse de copas, toma una decisión que transformará su relación con Altafulla.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Jacky confronta a todos en la casa para exigir la expulsión de Altafulla. Karime organiza una cita muy mexicana con la intención de espantar a José. Un invitado sorprende a todos, especialmente a Chile y Karime.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La llegada de Jey a la casa revive pasiones olvidadas en Jacky. Una nueva invitada llega con la intención de sabotear la relación entre Rocío y Santiago, mientras que dos invitadas deciden dejar la casa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El cumpleaños de Beni se descontrola, y Rocío acaba en un fuerte enfrentamiento. Isa recibe una llamada que la lleva a tomar una decisión inesperada, mientras que Alba y Altafulla logran reconciliarse.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Un juego sexual trae consecuencias negativas para Santiago y Rocío. Alba y Karime hacen oficial su compromiso. Chile cumple su promesa, y los rumores llevan a José y Santiago a un enfrentamiento.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Las vacaciones llegan a su fin y algunos invitados se despiden de la casa, mientras que una persona especial llega de sorpresa. Todos se preparan para la fiesta, pero para algunos, será la peor noche de sus vidas.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bast's Mariah, Part 1
programme.desc: On the way to Luxor, Joseph notices an electrical outlet set in a rock. Fascinated by the rare sight, Joseph goes in for a closer look and gets shocked. Though he seems fine afterward, soon all manner of small accidents begin to occur around him.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: On the way back home from Big Cimaron, Conrad is ambushed by Saralegi's bodyguard, Berius.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Saralegi journeys to the Great Demon Kingdom to retrieve his servant, Berius, but an unexpected guest shows up too.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: The connections between Saralegi, Berius, and Alazon are revealed.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Geneus returns to the Great Demon Kingdom to wreak havoc.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Yuri welcomes Alazon to Covenant Castle as a guest... but someone else doesn't want her there.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Now that he is the master of the Divine Sword, Sara imbues the weakened Geneus with its power to get revenge.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: The Great One has a final confrontation with Geneus, unless Yuri has something to say about it.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: When Yuri wakes up after sleeping for days, he finds that his demon magic is gone, so he's unable to go back to Earth.

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: Sage receives a word from the Ancient One.

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: Kidnapping the team one by one, Talpa begins his sinister plot.

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: Rowen's powers have taken a new turn.

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: The Ancient One finds an enemy.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Youpi transforms and splits up the group with his attack. Morel lets Shoot and Knuckle handle things while he heads for the King.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The King faces off against Netero and Zeno.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Knuckle suddenly appears before Youpi to fight him head on.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Zeno's cryptic words to Killua and Gon becomes clear when they reach the tower.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Feeling the need to lay a punch on Youpi to avenge his friend Shoot, Knuckle decides to take on Youpi once more.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Ikalgo reads Palm's hidden message, which says that she has gone to the palace and to assume that she is dead if she does not respond before the start of the mission.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Youpi is impressed by the extermination team's abilities and acknowledges their strength.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Morel destroys the cocoon before him, but as he suspected, Pouf is not inside.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bast's Mariah, Part 2
programme.desc: Due to the powers of an enemy Stand, Joseph's body becomes magnetized. While chasing after the woman he suspects is the Stand user, Joseph learns that Avdol has also become magnetized from touching a different electrical outlet.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Set's Alessi, Part 1
programme.desc: With Joseph and Avdol busy fighting Mariah, Jotaro and Polnareff get concerned about why they haven't shown up yet. As the two search Luxor, Polnareff senses someone following them and confronts the man.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: With his head full of saints and relics, newcomer Angus Ashworh is drawn to two rather gothic purchases, while David Harper gets in touch with his feminist side, snapping up some hatpins he thinks are of Suffragette origin.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and Tim Medhurst are having fun and chasing profits, from East Sussex to the coast of Dorset. Tim gets his hair washed while Catherine becomes a blacksmith.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and Tim Medhurst browse around Hampshire and West Sussex. But who'll be victorious at the auction in Hampshire?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and Tim Medhurst hit the shops, journeying from St Albans to Bushey in their safari-style classic car. Will antique biscuit tins prove to be profitable?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and Tim Medhurst visit Worcestershire, Oxfordshire and Gloucestershire. Tim unearths what could be a Roman coffin and Catherine phones a friend.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: A girl with some cherries lures Tim Medhurst to part with his cash, while Catherine Southon looks to a kaleidoscope for profit. Who'll reign in Wilshire and claim this Road Trip?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Veteran Road Tripper James Braxton tours the southeast with novice Izzie Balmer, an auctioneer with a penchant for jewelry. Will she take the crown with her jewels?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Izzie Balmer goes on a mission to Bletchley Park where codebreakers cracked messages from Hitler, while James Braxton dons a bandana and takes on English badminton.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Izzie Balmer tries out a winter sport that began in the Fens. James is fuelled by the food of the common man. And they're buying chairs like they're going out of fashion for a Suffolk auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Izzie Balmer and James Braxton visit the most easterly point. Izzie just can't resist the attractions of chairs -- Edwardian and Georgian. And James can't say no to a gigantic wine rack to go with his French cafe table.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Izzie Balmer is waylaid by the taste of Derbyshire and James Braxton takes a punt on some old headlines. It's full steam ahead to the finishing line at Lincoln. Can the tortoise outrun the hare?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: A new Trip sees experts Roo Irvine and Angus Ashworth searching for antiques in Northern Ireland. Expect silver jewelry and Victorian furniture made from an unlikely material.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Roo Irvine and Angus Ashworth traverse southwest Wales in style, on land and on water. Angus buys cheap, while Roo buys big.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts Roo Irvine and Angus Ashworth continue to scour the shops of south Wales for antiques. There are Welsh breakfasts, high-speed boats, and a little panic buying.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team travel to Wightwick Manor near Wolverhampton.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce looks back on another vintage year for the Antiques Roadshow.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team travel to Fountains Abbey near Ripon in Yorkshire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team travel to the newly restored Stowe House in Buckinghamshire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team head to Scotland for a busy day in the grounds of Cawdor Castle near Inverness.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team discover rare treasures on a visit to Chatham's historic dockyards.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team discover rare treasures on a visit to Chatham's historic dockyards.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Finds in Newstead Abbey include a collection of royal relics and a Victorian dog collar.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Objects on show at Cheltenham Town Hall include a curious table with hooves for legs.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Featured treasures include a valuable silver fruit bowl damaged in a domestic tiff.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Pieces featured include a poignant reminder from the battlefields of World War One.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts return to the backdrop of the Farnborough wind tunnels.

programme.title: The Dark: Nature's Nighttime World
programme.desc: A team of biologists and camera specialists learn how animals have adapted to the dark; in Costa Rica, nighttime camera specialist Justine Evans has an exceptionally close encounter with a large male jaguar.

programme.title: The Dark: Nature's Nighttime World
programme.desc: Bryson Volrin encounters a curious sloth; Gordon Buchanan enters a deserted house that has been taken over by vampire bats.

programme.title: Seasonal Wonderlands
programme.desc: New England is the stage for the most incredible color change on earth, when the vivid greens of summer give way to the golds and reds of autumn.

programme.title: Wild China
programme.desc: The landscapes of southern China, where rice is cultivated and a mysterious system of underground rivers is just beginning to be explored.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: Isolated and unstable mountains test the survival skills of wildlife in Africa.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: Savannahs are dynamic, energy-rich worlds of grasses and trees.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: Animals and plants find ingenious ways to survive in the desert.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: The rare and beautiful wildlife along the coasts of Africa.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: With an abundance of sunlight and rainfall, plants dominate in African rainforests.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: Wildlife in and around Africa's waterways.

programme.title: Wild Caribbean
programme.desc: The riches of the Caribbean and the processes that shape them.

programme.title: Wild Caribbean

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator is back with featherweight action as world champion Julia Budd puts her title on the line in a grudge rematch against Australian Arlene Blencowe.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator returns to Italy with a huge middleweight world title fight. Local hero Alessio Sakara will have the crowd on his side as he looks to dethrone current champion Rafael Carvalho, who comes in riding a six fight Bellator win streak of his own.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator brings the fight action from Newcastle, UK, as two newly inked superstars make their Bellator debuts. Both Valérie Létourneau and Michael McDonald will look for statement wins in the Bellator cage as they aim to send a message to their rivals.

programme.title: Bellator 192: Rampage vs Sonnen
programme.desc: Bellator MMA takes over The Forum with a highly anticipated showdown between “The American Gangster” Chael Sonnen and Rampage Jackson. Also, Douglas Lima and Rory MacDonald clash for the welterweight belt and Michael Chandler collides with Goiti Yamauchi.

programme.title: Best of Ryan Bader
programme.desc: Showcasing the best fights of Ryan Bader!

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Pechanga Resort and Casino with a contender showdown as Lorenz Larkin takes on Fernando Gonzalez. Plus Saad Awad looks to keep his hot streak alive against J .J. Ambrose. And AJ Matthews goes to war when he faces Kendall Grove!

programme.title: Bellator 194: Nelson vs Mitrione
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Mohegan Sun with heavyweight grand prix action, as Matt Mitrione and Roy "Big Country" Nelson go to battle with each man looking to advance to the semi finals. Also on the card, KO artist Patricky Pitbull and Vadim Nemkov.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is back with a bantamweight world title fight as Darrion Caldwell looks to defend his belt against dangerous opponent Leandro Higo. Card also features the return of baddest man on the planet, Joe Warren, as he takes on veteran Joe Taimanglo.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: They smoke, drink, speed, pop pills, disappear all night and disrespect their parents all day. They are teens gone wild and Dr. Phil has a wake-up call for them and their parents. Parents, if you're in power struggles with your teen, don't miss this show!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Brad says he can't choose between his wife, Michele, and his girlfriend, who's calling herself "Sarah" to protect her identity. Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil examines two headlines: A handyman's discovery of four mentally challenged people held captive in a tiny, dank sub-basement of a Philadelphia building. Plus parents in a Washington suburb face charges for imprisoning & starving 16-year-old twins.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: When you and your beloved say "I do," it's "for better or worse." But what happens when all you feel is the "worse" part and wind up trapped in a bad marriage?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Amber was the envy of her friends, married, 2 kids, a beautiful home & 6-figure salary as a top-selling real estate agent. When she and her husband divorced, her life spiraled out of control. Dr.Phil examines Amber's fall from grace. Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: People, eager to give opinions, can lose an entire career with just one tweet. Kathy won Miss Michigan 2019 but lost the crown the next day because of comments she made on social media.Plus, Carissa's transphobic posts derailed her dreams.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The conversation heated when Dr. Phil gave self-professed bully Temica RoShawn a reality check about her aggressive behavior. Guests Ross & Lyndy say weeks of bullying culminated in their 15-yr-old son being sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil exposes an online dating fraud -- a catfish -- accused of duping as many as 26 women into relationships. What were the red flags the women missed? Plus, a Dr. Phil producer tracks the catfish down -- and you won’t believe who they find!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Waco & Alley left their home state with their 3-year-old child, missing a custody hearing, & have no idea the court then granted guardianship to Waco's parents. Tensions run high when Dr. Phil reveals to Waco & Alley they lost custody of their child!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: When you imagine getting an inheritance, you might assume all your financial problems would be solved. But can the money be more trouble than it's worth?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: While battling cancer, Paula learned her 21-year-old daughter, C.J., had been turning to drugs, and that her husband had an affair. Can this family come together to save C.J.?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Melvin says he is torn between his wife of eight years, Rachel, and his girlfriend of two years, Chantelle, and he wants Dr. Phil to help decide whom he should choose. When the women meet face to face for the first time, does Dr. Phil help him choose?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Natalie, 22, says her boyfriend Justin, 25, has an anger problem, and she fears for her life and for their 10-month-old son. Both admit their child has witnessed turmoil. Does this young relationship have a future?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: With Nancy Grace, children's rights attorney Paul Mones & criminologist Dr. Denise Boots, Dr. Phil delves into the headlines: a starved & beaten teen escaping his torturers, an 8-year-old boy arrested for killing his father & two reporters found dead.

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny side up in an all-new Drew's News. Plus, in an all-new Drew-Gooder, Drew is surprising a very deserving do-gooder in a big way!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actor Idris Elba and his wife Sabrina Elba join Drew for a lively conversation while cruising around New York City in her minivan, which Drew likes to call her "Drewber.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Icon Martha Stewart and Drew tackle relationship red flags at the news desk and Martha reveals which young star she simply adores.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Mindy Kaling talks holiday prep with kids, shares behind-the-scenes stories from "The Office" and "Oceans 8" and more. Drew & Ross Mathews cover snooze button science, dating ghosting debate, and saving a NY deli on Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: All American" star Taye Diggs is joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to hit the hottest headlines of the day! Jamila Norman is joining Drew and Taye and sharing tips on how to build your own herb garden.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Honk for Jesus" star Regina Hall joins Drew to chat. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Plus, In A Minute Drew and Regina surprise one lucky audience member with a big prize!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: At Midnight" star Whitney Cummings is joining Drew to take a bungee fitness class! She's also covering the news with Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk including why women may smell different after leaving a boyfriend's place.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: A year ago, actress Dylan Mulvaney publicly came out as a trans woman for the first time and began documenting her transition in her Tik-Tok series "Days of Girlhood," that now has over a billion views.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Kiera Knightley and Carrie Coon join Drew to talk about their upcoming film, "Boston Strangler."Drew and her co-pilotRoss Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Pilar Valdes and Drew share money-saving holiday meal. Drew & Ross Mathews talk empowering single moms, Greta Gerwig's thoughts on a movie, and feature Drew-crime segment with two great grandmas stopping a purse snatcher. (200)

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Alaska Daily" star Hilary Swank joins Drew to chat. Plus, "Ghosts" stars Utkarsh Ambudkar is helping serve the news sunny-side up by joining Drew at the news desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Long Island Medium" star Theresa Caputo is chatting with Drew about her work as a medium, the show and more. She's also doing a special reading of the studio audience.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Chef Ronnie Woo is cooking up a storm with co-host Ross Mathews. Then, Drew and Ross discuss some of the latest and greatest headlines.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actor Justice Smith joins Drew and he's dishing about his latest film, "Dungeons and Dragons." Drew and Ross Mathews are joined by Ali Landry at the Drew's News desk as they serve the news sunny-side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Preppy Kitchen: Recipes for Seasonal Dishes and Simple Pleasures" cookbook author John Kanell joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk for Drew's News: Food Edition.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Tiki Barber joins Drew & Ross Mathews on Drew's News covering headlines about lies in relationships & finding a sheep in an Airbnb. Chef Anne Burrell teaches cooking honey garlic salmon & charred string beans in Drew's Cooking School.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Camilla Cabello opens-up about dating, what she's looking for in her next partner, working with relationship goals couple Gwen Stefani and Blake Shelton on "The Voice" and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are hitting the headlines in an all-new Drew's News. Drew chats with "The Fabelmans" star Gabe LaBelle who shares what it was like working with and portraying a young Steven Spielberg. Chef Melissa King joins Drew in the kitchen.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Tamera Mowry Housley opens up about sharing her spicy to-do list with her husband in her new memoir, "You Should Sit Down For This!," the possibility of a "Sister, Sister" reboot and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Entertainment Tonight's Kevin Frazier and Nischelle Turner are joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk for a special Oscars themed Drew's News, sharing their predictions for the awards show.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew sits down with tennis superstar Serena Williams to chat about her final match, her family life and her new children's book, 'The Adventures of Qai Qai.' Plus, Serena plays a rapid fire round of all of her favorites in GOATS To Go.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actress Eva Longoria is joining Drew in the kitchen and they're cooking up Spaghetti Alle Vongole. Best-selling author Lewis Howes joins Drew and Ross Mathewsat the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Ant-Man and the Wasp: Quantumania" star William Jackson Harper is telling Drew about his role in the new Marvel film, why he took his dog to a pet psychic and how he met his girlfriend.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Your Place or Mine" star Tig Notaro is telling Drew about working with Reese Witherspoon on their new film and the latest season of "The Morning Show.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny side up in an all-new Drew's News. Plus, Drew helps the bridesmaid who went viral for accidentally eating a special cake for the bride and groom make her wedding wrong right.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The cast of "Daisy Jones and the Six" talk with Drew about their new show! They're chatting all about the 70's theme of the show, their time on set and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The cast of "Emily in Paris" including Lily Collins, Ashley Park, Philippine Leroy-Beaulieu and Lucas Bravo stop by to chat about the new season. The cast is also participating in an "Emily in Paris" style makeover for a deserving audience member.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny receives a box from Cousin Pearl in the hills. One of the items in the box is an old-fashioned crank telephone. Granny asks Jethro to hook it up to a party line on the pole, so she can listen in on the party line

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny despairs of Elly Mae ever finding a husband and decides to promote her non-existent cooking skills. She is entered into a TV show cook-off, but nothing she fixes is edible.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A con artist pretends to be someone from back home and stays with the Clampetts. She plans to get photos of Jed in a compromising position in order to blackmail him.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro decides to sophisticate Emaline, but she has bigger plans for blackmailing Mr. Drysdale with her cuckoo clock camera. The colonel continues to woo Granny. The two swindlers though haven't met someone as sharp as Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is chopping wood while a chimpanzee named May Bell watches. He wishes that he could teach May Bell to chop wood. When Elly May comes by, she and Jethro talk and decide that they want a gorilla.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts miss Herbie and ask Mr. Drysdale to get the tame gorilla back. The banker promises to help, but actually hinders the effort.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's soap making sends noxious smoke into the air, which gets the attention of smog commissioner Tinsley. He shuts down the operation, and Jed decides to run against him when he misunderstands Mr. Drysdale's advice.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed takes a job on the board of directors of O.K. Oil Company.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is so desperate to meet a woman that when Miss Hathaway's bird watching group arrives, he goes out of his way to try to impress the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: In order to buy Mrs. Drysdale a special Christmas present, the Clampetts take seasonal jobs in a department store.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny discovers Martians next door at the Drysdale mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny decides to take her share of the Clampett millions and move back home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed and Granny decide to donate the burden of their millions to some college students and move back home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Crowfoot Indians come to Beverly Hills to discuss a boundary dispute at the Clampett oil field, Granny prepares for war.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After reading the Society page, Granny decides the best way to get Elly a husband is to throw her a coming out party, complete with possum burgers and gopher gravy. Mrs. Drysdale, hoping to forever humiliate them, is all too happy to help.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampketts come across Narda and Yerko, two gypsies, who decide to run a scam on the unsuspecting clan. Involving both a marriage prophecy and a curse, the crooks see the families' naivety to their advantage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts are visited by a real king, Alexander, so Granny and Mrs. Drysdale start matchmaking. The broke royal needs a wealthy bride and courts Ellie. Drysdale niece Doreen is tricked by a costumed Jethro and ends up unimpressed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts acquire a hippopotamus when an advertising scheme originated by banker Drysdale backfires.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Banker Milburn 'Drysdale's precocious 11-year-old nephew swindles the hillbillies of all the valuable art objects in their mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Clampett has inherited a castle in the English countryside. Jethro insists that everyone, except Granny, wear the royal raiment's of Elizabeth (the First, of course).

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts head to England to visit the castle Jed inherited. Misunderstandings abound, from Jethro mistaking San Francisco for London, to the impounding of Granny's medical supplies, to the real intentions of the elderly chemist.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts finally make it to their new castle and try to adjust to the English way of castle life, at the least the way Jethro thinks it is, based on his understanding of English myths and legends.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Jethro gets his draft notice, Jed decides he should pay what it costs the Army to train inductees. When Mr. Drysdale hears this, he starts figuring how he can get Jethro out on a Section 8.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro reports to the induction center after getting his draft notice. The Army isn't quite sure what to make of Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Since Granny can't plant crops in their yard, Jed thinks the solution is to buy her a plot a land somewhere else. He figures a place called Happy Acres is the best spot to buy land, not realizing it's a cemetery.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro thinks he wants to be a naval frogman, but Granny is concerned her tonic has transformed him. Mr. Drysdale, concerned about finances, has Miss Jane distract Jethro with comics, causing him to want to fly to the moon.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro heads down to the Reserves HQ while wearing an ancestor's Confederate Army uniform. The Sergeant thinks he's an actor there to participate in a Civil War reenactment. Jethro runs home to tell Granny the Civil War is still on.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Tonight, a powerful house meeting will put everything out in the open. Plus, will Kyle be nominated at the veto meeting? And who will be evicted from the house?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Who will become the new Head of Household, and who will be targeted for eviction? Plus Zingbot is back to roast the final seven.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: BB Comics are back! Who will rise to the super occasion and win the power of Veto, and will it be used to save Alyssa or DJ Showtime?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Tonight, either Alyssa or DJ Showtime will be sent to Jury, but they won't be alone. Double eviction baby. A full week of gameplay in one night.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Tonight, with only 5 remaining the game kicks in to overdrive. Witness the drama you didn't see that lead to Michaels shocking eviction. Plus, a new head of household will be crowned & two more houseguest hit the block.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: The final five go cuckoo trying to win the power of Veto. Will it be used to save one of the nominees?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: A Brittany spiral could change the fate of the nominees. Who will be sent to the jury, and who will win the Head of Household, guaranteeing a spot for them at finale night.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: The final four go to battle in an action-packed hour. Who will Taylor nominate for eviction? Plus the final and most important veto competition of the summer plays out.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Tonight, Monte will cast a sole vote to evict either Brittany or Turner from the game. Who will make it to finale night? Plus, is there trouble in HOH homeroom paradise? And the legendary Cookout Alliance will reunite live to discuss the final three.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: With the final three set, Monte, Taylor, and Turner will look back at the epic summer. Witness the LOLs. The TMIs. Plus, part one of the final three-part head of household competition kicks off.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Tonight, all three parts of the Head of Household competition play out. Who will emerge victorious and earn the power to cast the final eviction vote of BB 24? Plus, the jury returns to choose the winner of the $750,000 grand prize.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Sixteen complete strangers enter this house, to try to make their own mark on 'BB' history. Totally cut off from the outside world, they compete for safety and power. Each week, they will vote to evict one of their own, until only one houseguest ...

programme.title: Get Rich or Die Tryin'
programme.desc: Following a near-fatal gun battle, Marcus recalls his journey from orphaned street kid from the Bronx to making his mark in the drug trade to teaming up with a fellow ex-con (Terrence Howard) for his shot at becoming a successful rap artist.

programme.title: Hustle & Flow
programme.desc: The tale of DJay, a pimp whose hustle selling sexy Nola leaves him wondering if this is it for him. Only when he trades contraband for a keyboard and bumps into his old school friend Key does he see a way out by laying down some tracks.

programme.title: Juice
programme.desc: Q. Raheem. Bishop. Steel. They're four Harlem friends who spend their days hanging out and looking for a way to get the power and respect they call Juice. Q hopes to earn respect by becoming a scratch 'n' mix DJ.

programme.title: Get Rich or Die Tryin'
programme.desc: Following a near-fatal gun battle, Marcus recalls his journey from orphaned street kid from the Bronx to making his mark in the drug trade to teaming up with a fellow ex-con (Terrence Howard) for his shot at becoming a successful rap artist.

programme.title: Hustle & Flow
programme.desc: The tale of DJay, a pimp whose hustle selling sexy Nola leaves him wondering if this is it for him. Only when he trades contraband for a keyboard and bumps into his old school friend Key does he see a way out by laying down some tracks.

programme.title: Gang Related
programme.desc: Corrupt detectives Tupac Shakur and James Belushi, having framed an innocent man (Dennis Quaid) for the murder of an undercover DEA agent, find their lives unraveling when they come under the scrutiny of DEA investigator Richard Simms (Gary Cole).

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Fred is sure that the ring Lamont gave him as a present is the one he has heard was stolen from Frank Sinatra. Fearing reprisal, Fred breaks into the visiting Mr. Sinatra's hotel room to cover up the 'theft' and return the 'stolen' ring.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Fred puts his foot down between Grady and his fiancée when the bride-to-be announces that after their marriage, Grady will no longer be spending his evenings at the Sanford home.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: Louise appears to be a shoo-in for the Help Center's Volunteer of the Year Award, until a woman who has been no help for eight months suddenly donates $25,000 to the Center.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: George's oversight ruins the homecoming celebration for the Jefferson's former neighbor Harry Bentley who arrives expecting to move back into his old apartment, but discovers that he's a man without a home.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: The arrival of an unexpected letter from a childhood chum goads George into an outlandish youthful competition that Louise is determined to halt before one of them gets hurt.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: An unexpected turn of events in George's latest harebrained promotional gimmick -- the Miss Jefferson Cleaners' Beauty Pageant -- leaves him in a compromising position.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: George and Tom's reminiscences of their fathers on Christmases past place in perspective their reasons for joy for their Christmas present.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: A star-struck Louise inadvertently becomes Sammy Davis, Jr.'s last line of defense in his battle to find some peace and relaxation away from fans and a hounding, sleazy tabloid reporter. Sammy Davis, Jr., makes a special guest star appearance as himself.
When Mary can't solve daughter Brenda's boy problems, Brenda enlists the aid of an expert -- Mary's nemesis, Sandra, their sultry, sexy and 'man-wise' neighbor.

Young Calvin's unemployment has gotten everyone at '227' so concerned that 'always-involved' Mary badgers husband Lester into hiring him--but when Lester is forced to fire the awkward teenager, the residents explode.

After Mary's refrigerator breaks down, her sly and opportunistic neighbor Sandra readily agrees to use her 'influence' on their stingy landlord to get her a new one--in exchange for Mary lending her apartment to Sandra for one of her 'small gatherings.'

Mary Jenkins, the irrepressible meddler and protector of '227' gives honesty a beating after she backs into a neighbor's parked car and then calls upon her 'man-wise' nemesis Sandra to use her feminine wiles to calm the handsome man's anger.
Mary fires Cupid's arrow at her brother Lewis and best friend Rose, but she misses the mark when Lewis sets his own sights on resident vamp Sandra.
Brenda's genealogy assignment triggers a war between her mother Mary and neighbor Sandra over famous ancestors--but Mary's pride soon goes AWOL when she learns her family tree has root rot.

programme.title: Malcolm & Eddie
programme.desc: Following her divorce, Eddie's mom arrives for a visit that coincides with one from Malcolm's dad.

programme.title: Malcolm & Eddie
programme.desc: Malcolm and Eddie decide to settle an argument by trading jobs for a day.

programme.title: Malcolm & Eddie
programme.desc: Malcolm faces a difficult decision in order to get Simone to keep making her extraordinary cookies.

programme.title: Malcolm & Eddie
programme.desc: Eddie ignores Nicolette's premonition and agrees to fill in for an injured race car driver.

programme.title: The Best Of Flip Wilson
programme.desc: Window washer (Flip) advises corporate execs; Burns & Schreiber do their taxi routine and Tony's a Chinese football doctor.

programme.desc: Flip plays Bill Russell in a game of 1-on-1 (chess, that is) and Geraldine square dances with Johnny Cash.

programme.title: The Best Of Flip Wilson
programme.desc: Slappy does stand-up; sketches include Pink Pirate (Conway) w/castaways (Flip & Slappy) and a convoluted con game.

programme.title: The Best Of Flip Wilson
programme.desc: Coco, Nabors & Flip do theater parody; Freddie Johnson shops for a card and Geraldine battles McNair to be queen of a parade.

programme.title: Webster
programme.desc: After learning that his buddies from school have died, George quits his job and resolves to live life to the hilt.

programme.title: Webster
programme.desc: Webster and Nicky's excitement over a fund-raiser they organized fizzles when the proceeds are stolen.

programme.title: Webster
programme.desc: A weekend at Wisconsin Dells with parents of Webster's best friend reveals more than Katherine and George want to see, they are nudists.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew

programme.desc: On the eve of his well-deserved holiday to Paris, Wycliffe agrees to take a murder case and encounters bureaucratic roadblocks that jeopardize the investigation, his career, and even his life.

programme.title: Wycliffe: The Cycle of Death
programme.desc: When Penzance bookseller Matthew Glyn is found murdered Wycliffe uncovers a far from happy family situation. One of his brothers, Alfred, is a recluse who has not spoken to him for years.

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: With Wycliffe recovering from Patrick Durno's (Leslie Grantham, "EastEnders") attempt to kill him, Kersey takes charge when Farmer Miller wages war on anglers legally fishing on his land.

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: Nick and the team follow up a Dinosaur sighting in the Forest of Dean.

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: A giant spider attacks on the London Undergound, and the team are on the case.

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: Nick realises that travelling through time is the way to stop an ancient sea monster.

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: A flock of dodos brings a deadly parasite with them.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa is leaving for Spain. Bert and Jennifer's engagement party goes off with a bang. Al is hailed as a hero for saving Caroline's life.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Former surgeon Dr Martin Ellingham arrives in the sleepy Cornish hamlet of Portwenn, replacing the former GP who has died.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Martin's surgery officially opens for business, but patients continue to treat it as a drop-in cafe.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: When an epidemic of diarrhea strikes the village, the doctor takes immediate action. This, however, does not go down well with the population.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando dos guardias de una prisión privada de máxima seguridad en Texas son asesinados, la UAC presiente que más de un sospechoso dentro de la prisión podría estar involucrado.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez se apresuran a encontrar a una niña desaparecida que morirá en 72 horas sin su medicación para el corazón.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando Danny pide ayuda a su archienemigo encarcelado, Victor Lugo (Nick Cordero), para localizar a un criminal peligroso que escapó de prisión, Lugo acepta colaborar solo si puede unirse a la búsqueda.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Frank se enfrenta a una empresa de rastreo de datos cuando se niegan a desbloquear el teléfono de un terrorista que podría tener información sobre próximos objetivos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: En el final de la octava temporada, tras una serie de tiroteos mortales después de que seis hombres injustamente condenados fueran liberados, Danny y Baez se preguntan si los asesinatos fueron parte de un plan de venganza de los exconvictos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Un reservista naval de alta seguridad es encontrado muerto. Gibbs colabora con la Dra. Samantha Ryan de PsyOps para descubrir la verdad detrás del posible suicidio. Mientras tanto, DiNozzo discute con contabilidad tras ver el salario de McGee.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo investiga el asesinato de un suboficial principal, creyendo que está relacionado con un traficante de armas internacional.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El secretario de la Marina asigna a Gibbs a trabajar con la Dra. Samantha Ryan después de que información secreta haya sido filtrada desde adentro.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El cuñado del director Vance es el principal sospechoso cuando Gibbs y el equipo de NCIS investigan el asesinato de un marinero.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando dos guardias de una prisión privada de máxima seguridad en Texas son asesinados, la UAC presiente que más de un sospechoso dentro de la prisión podría estar involucrado.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El UAC es convocado a Wisconsin en busca de un asesino serial, el equipo busca una conexión entre las víctimas para encontrar pistas del sospechoso. Además, Kate tiene dificultades para lidiar con su sobrina, Meg, cuando comienza a comportarse mal.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la esposa de un prometedor congresista desaparece, la UAC investiga a sus enemigos políticos como posibles sospechosos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una familia de cuatro miembros es secuestrada durante unas vacaciones en Barbados, la UAC es convocada para asistir al jefe de la unidad Jack Garrett (Gary Sinise) y a su unidad internacional en su investigación.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny se encarga de un caso personal que involucra a un miembro del cartel de la droga, Louis Delgado, quien Danny cree que es responsable por incendiar su casa. Erin es ascendida en la oficina del fiscal, pero se encuentra en una situación difícil.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Steve Austin hosts this bunch of 12 rough and rowdy good old boys and girls on an uninhabited paradise, as they battle each other for $100,000 in cold hard cash.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: A new redneck in peak physical condition arrives on the island challenging established relationships. The contestants are already tired of canned food, the contestants decide to hunt for an alternate protein source: LIZARD!

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: As the castaway rednecks hunt for jungle veggies, they learn that you shouldn¹t search for food in the area that used to be the latrine.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: With one team dominating, Steve makes a surprise announcement that makes tensions run high on the island; the rednecks are excited about the arrival of some new critters in the camp and must decide where they fall on the food chain.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Redneck Island explodes with excitement when a crate of heavenly ice-cold beer washes up onshore. The party is short-lived, however, when Steve Austin informs them he has alternate plans for their precious beverage.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The remaining rednecks decide to liven up camp-life by pulling pranks on each other, building a waterslide, and giving some of the guys their first pedicures. All the primping and fun stops when one team loses the challenge.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The lines in the sand between the Orange and Blue teams get erased when Steve Austin makes a surprise visit to camp to announce a major shift in the competition: Contestants will now be competing individually instead of as teams.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: It is down to the final five. After a day of bowling and fishing, a sharp-shooting challenge makes one contestant safe from elimination while putting two others on the firing line.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A chase ends when one of the police units successfully performs a pit maneuver which eventually disables the vehicle. An officer responds to a domestic dispute between a mother and her son. Officers attempt to pull over a vehicle with expired tags.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer coordinates a reverse-prostitution sting designed to capture suspects who solicit prostitutes. An inebriated man is detained until he sobers up. Officers stop a vehicle which was reported stolen.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue a vehicle traveling up to 100mph on a local freeway. An officer is dispatched to a larceny in progress at a local convenience store. A man threatens an elderly woman at their residence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted man sprints across a freeway to evade police, a woman is arrested for breaking her friend's windows, and a driver tries to talk his way out of a road rage arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A trespassing suspect claims to be a federal informant, officers inspect an erratically driven car and find a safe, and a familiar face swears this time she's going to rehab.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car eludes a DUI checkpoint only to crash, one woman takes the fall for everyone in her group, and a man hides his stash in the one place he thinks police will never look.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect fresh out of jail is found with narcotics. A motorcycle named 'Love Machine' is saved from a hot wire. A man bursts his tire in a bad place and officers come to the rescue.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies race against time to save a young boy who is trapped inside a house fire. An intoxicated patron demands a beer on credit and argues with a store clerk. An older woman struggles with heroin.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers coordinate a prostitution sting. Officers pull over a vehicle with a missing license plate. Officers stop a woman driving a stolen vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man wrecks his friend's car while fleeing police, detectives arrest a man wanted for armed robbery and attempted murder, and officers spy a subject who eluded them earlier.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a traffic dispute involving an assault with a tire iron. Police are led to a battered woman after she dials 911. Officers on patrol encounter a couple engaged in prostitution.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police catch up to a man with warrants and a history of resisting arrest, a fidgety driver arouses suspicion, and a minor with beers in his pants has to answer to his mom.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist leads officers on a low-speed chase, a motorist who led police on a dangerous chase feigns ignorance, and a couple's date ends with a totaled car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Tinted car windows draw suspicion from a roaming patrol, a concerned friend gets a punch in the nose, and a traffic stop leads police a meth pipe in an odd place.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers search for suspects stealing rims at a car dealership. A married couple claim drugs found in their car were from a nearby ditch. Officers detain an inebriated man arguing with a store clerk.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a driver who ran a stop sign. A suspect wearing a D.A.R.E. T-shirt is found to be in possession of drugs. A woman claims the drugs found in the vehicle she’s sleeping in are not hers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Several units are in pursuit of a stolen vehicle. A man is found unconscious behind the wheel of a car after he crashed into a tree. Officers intervene in domestic dispute between a stripper and her boyfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit ends in a foot chase. Stolen property is found in a suspect’s car during a traffic stop. An altercation ends with a brick being tossed at a victim’s car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing motorcyclist crashes into an occupied trailer, a stubborn suspect plays dumb, and officers are disappointed when they run into a repeat offender.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect tries to ditch his stash in a laundromat, a nervous driver arouses suspicion, and a woman returning home from a night out finds her boyfriend has changed the locks.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver leaves her car during a routine traffic stop, officers stop a car that appears to have fake tags, and police respond to an altercation between a father and son.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call that a man shot up his parents' house, a fleeing suspect hopes a change of clothes will fool the police, and a shaky hit-and-run story unravels.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist tries to escape on foot, a couple's synthetic marijuana use catches up with them, and an officer tries to get the real story behind a domestic disturbance.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers attempt to pull over a suspect who was reported to have been involved in a car-jacking. A suspect is caught in the act of burying a bag filled with illegal prescription drugs. Officers attempt to pull over a vehicle with no headlights.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers wrestle with a familiar nuisance to shop owners, a man's lucky dollar lets him down during a traffic stop, and too much whiskey leads to a domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers coax a man off a large construction crane. An inebriated male suspect is jailed after an officer deduces that he had been abusive toward his girlfriend. A man is rescued from a flash flood, but his truck isn’t so lucky.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A quiet passenger makes a run for it during a traffic stop, a stolen puppy is safely returned to its family, and a struggling woman hits a speed bump on her road to recovery.

programme.desc: When the CSI team investigates a case involving the world of domination, Grissom pays a visit to Lady Heather to help find some answers.

programme.title: CSI

programme.desc: Se llevan a la fenómeno del tenis Lana Walker de su habitación por la noche y la única evidencia que tienen para continuar es una fibra púrpura encontrada en el marco de la ventana.

programme.desc: Cuando golpean casi hasta la muerte a una ex-víctima de violación, Horacio debe entrar al mundo de las cárceles y las personas en libertad condicional para encontrar al culpable.

programme.desc: Todd Burton está tratando de salir de la furia del huracán cuando mata a un hombre en medio de una tormenta que le impide ver y ahora lo acusan de homicidio vehicular involuntario.

programme.desc: Encuentran muerto a un marine en Central Park. Al otro lado de la ciudad, el equipo investiga la muerte de una mujer encontrada en un auto incendiado.

programme.title: Llévame En Tus Brazos
programme.desc: Pedro le debe un dinero a Antonio. Su deuda se saldará de la manera más infame. El sacrificio de una hija por su familia y la renuncia de su felicidad.

programme.title: Las fuerzas vivas
programme.desc: En un pueblo aislado se recibe la noticia de que ha estallado la revolución. Los dos partidos políticos que regentan la ciudad aprovechen para hacer campaña en favor de sus intereses.

programme.title: Las luchadoras contra el médico asesino
programme.desc: Un científico psicológicamente inestable opera los cerebros de las mujeres que secuestra. A raíz del rapto de su hermana, Gloria Venus jurará venganza contra el experto y trazará un plan para matarlo.

programme.title: La flecha envenenada (LAS)
programme.desc: Una joven huérfana es atacada por apaches y debe pagar las deudas de su padre, ya que puede ser despojada de sus tierras.

programme.title: Los Alegres Aguilares
programme.desc: El aventurero Manuel se encuentra con Carlos, quien es casi idéntico a él. Uno es de familia rica y el otro no. Entonces Manuel le ofrece dinero a Carlos para que se haga pasar por él con una señorita con la cual no se quiere casar.

programme.title: Los Cuatro Juanes
programme.desc: Los Cuatro famosos Juanes: Juan Colorado, Juan Sin Miedo, Juan Pistolas y Juan Charrasqueado pasan peligrosas aventuras para llevar un importante cargamento de armas y municiones desde Veracruz hasta un pueblo sitiado por las fuerzas del gobierno.

programme.title: La hija del general
programme.desc: Existe la forma correcta, la forma equivocada y la forma del ejército. Pero bajo ninguna circunstancia, el investigador militar Paul Brenner ayudará a los oficiales de Fort MacCallum a encubrir el motivo de la muerte de una hermosa oficial.

programme.title: Desierto
programme.desc: A group of people trying to cross the border from Mexico into the United States encounter a racist man who has taken border patrol duties into his own hands.

programme.title: Acechada
programme.desc: Una mujer policía recibe un caso en el que descubre que todos los asesinados son antiguos novios.

programme.title: Pinero
programme.desc: Piñero" cuenta la historia del ícono latino, poeta, dramaturgo y actor Miguel Piñero.

programme.title: Nada como la familia
programme.desc: Los dispersos miembros de la familia Rodríguez se reúnen en la casa de sus padres para enfrentar lo que podría ser su última Navidad juntos en esta conmovedora comedia navideña.

programme.title: El punto sobre la i
programme.desc: El cineasta Matthew Parkhill añade un giro tras otro, formando una sorprendente película de suspenso romántico. Gael García Bernal interpreta al forastero, Natalia Verbeke es Carmen y James D’Arcy retrata a su prometido.

programme.title: Códigos de guerra
programme.desc: John Woo dirige este épico drama de acción sobre un soldado de la Segunda Guerra Mundial (Nicolas Cage) asignado para proteger a un soldado navajo (Adam Beach) ... y el código secreto que conoce.

programme.title: Cosas te tíos
programme.desc: Jason Lee interpreta a un ejecutivo en la ciudad de Seattle que se va a casar con la hija de su jefe (Selma Blair). Su vida se convierte en una pesadilla cuando no se acuerda si la engañó durante su despedida de soltero.

programme.title: La Mexicana
programme.desc: Un hombre trata de llevar a través de la frontera una antigua pistola llamada La Mexicana, que se cree que está maldita, mientras su novia lo presiona para que abandone sus costumbres criminales.

programme.title: Alfie, el seductor irresistible
programme.desc: Cuando las consecuencias de su estilo de vida afectan a la mujer que ama y a su mejor amigo (Omar Epps), Alfie comienza a preguntarse si hay cosas más importantes que estos romances pasajeros. De ser así, ¿de qué se trata?

programme.title: Padre soltero
programme.desc: Ben Affleck, Jennifer López y George Carlin protagonizan esta comedia irresistible. Un relato sincero sobre un hombre que de repente es un padre soltero, aprendiendo que debe aceptar su identidad y reconocer lo que lo hace feliz.

programme.title: El príncipe y yo
programme.desc: Una fantástica historia de amor sobre una estudiante de medicina que se enamora de un príncipe danés que se negó a seguir las tradiciones de sus padres y vino a EE.UU. a rebelarse.

programme.title: Ella espera un bebé
programme.desc: Jake y Kristi eran dos jóvenes solteros locos y enamorados. Pero un año después, se convirtieron en dos adultos locos y casados atravesando una fase de transición.

programme.title: Frankie & Johnny
programme.desc: Pfeiffer interpreta a Frankie, una camarera en una cafetería de Nueva York. Después de una serie de relaciones desafortunadas, lo último que Frankie busca es un hombre nuevo... hasta que él viene a buscarla.

programme.title: El Robo más Grande de la Historia
programme.desc: Basada en una historia real, Dwayne Johnson interpreta a un detective de la policía de Nueva York que intenta resolver el mayor robo de dinero de la historia de Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Apocalypto
programme.desc: As the Mayan kingdom faces its decline, a young man is taken on a perilous journey to a world ruled by fear and oppression.

programme.title: Contacto sangriento
programme.desc: El maestro de Ninjutsu Frank Dux viaja a Hong Kong para participar en el Kumite, las olimpiadas de artes marciales, y conoce a una hermosa periodista estadounidense. Al poco tiempo deberá enfrentarse a Chong-Li, un despiadado maestro coreano de taekwondo.

programme.title: Doble identidad: jaque al MI-5
programme.desc: Cuando un terrorista escapa a su custodia durante un traspaso de rutina, Will Holloway (Kit Harrington) lo rastrea antes de un inminente ataque terrorista en Londres.

programme.title: Justa venganza
programme.desc: Después de que su esposa es brutalmente asesinada, el exmafioso Ben Archer libra la guerra contra las tríadas chinas. Protagonizada por la leyenda de acción Jean-Claude Van Damme.

programme.title: Iron Monkey
programme.desc: Presentado por Quentin Tarantino, Iron Monkey es el brioso relato de una misteriosa y mítica leyenda china de artes marciales excitantes e incesantes.

programme.title: El cuervo 2: Ciudad de Ángeles
programme.desc: Esta secuela veloz y llena de acción de "El cuervo" sigue el ascenso de la víctima de asesinato Ashe Corven, que regresa a la vida gracias a un misterioso cuervo. Con la ayuda de una mujer llamada Sarah, se venga de sus asesinos uno por uno.

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos
programme.desc: Un grupo de mariachis salen de casa por primera vez para competir en un certamen nacional en la ciudad de México. Los 8 hombres tienen que soportar muchos desafíos, lo que parece ser una oportunidad de su vida, pronto podría conducir al final del grupo.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: Me late chocolate
programme.desc: Después de que su prometido muere inesperadamente, una mujer decide aceptar la vida y seguir su sueño de trabajar con chocolate.

programme.title: Qué pena tu vida
programme.desc: Un hombre inseguro y con el corazón roto, trata de recuperar a su último amor con la ayuda de su amigo fiel, tomando un camino de malas decisiones que lo llevan a comprenderse a sí mismo y a los demás.

programme.title: Ilusiones S.A.
programme.desc: Para hacer feliz a su mujer, un hombre contrata a una empresa que crea fantasías para fingir que su nieto, quien los dejó hace años, es un hombre de bien. Pero el verdadero nieto, quien es en realidad un delincuente, se aparece exigiendo dinero.

programme.title: Del amor y otros demonios
programme.desc: Una mordida de perro cambia la vida de Sierva y es abandonada hasta que conoce a un cura.

programme.title: Perfectos desconocidos
programme.desc: Cuando un grupo de mejores amigos se reúne durante un eclipse lunar para compartir una cena íntima en la elegante casa de Eva y Antonio, sospechan que se trata de otra noche cualquiera hasta que la anfitriona les propone un juego.

programme.title: Sospechoso cero
programme.desc: Un agente del FBI que investiga la muerte de un asesino serial sigue la pista de un justiciero que dedica su vida a perseguir asesinos seriales.

programme.title: La Dama De Negro
programme.desc: Arthur Kipps (Daniel Radcliff), un abogado viudo, debe ir a un pueblo remoto a resolver los asuntos de un excéntrico recién fallecido. Pero al llegar, descubre que todos en el pueblo ocultan un secreto mortal.

programme.title: Insectos
programme.desc: Un veterano de guerra paranoico y desquiciado que ve insectos por todas partes se refugia con una mujer solitaria en una espeluznante habitación de un motel de Oklahoma.

programme.title: El regreso de los muertos vivientes
programme.desc: En su primer día en un almacén de material médico, Freddy (Thom Mathews) libera sin querer un gas tóxico de un contenedor militar secreto. El gas reanima un ejército de cadáveres, que salen de la tumba con un hambre voraz... ¡de cerebros!

programme.title: Sospechoso cero
programme.desc: Un agente del FBI que investiga la muerte de un asesino serial sigue la pista de un justiciero que dedica su vida a perseguir asesinos seriales.

programme.title: La mitad siniestra
programme.desc: Thad Beaumont (Timothy Hutton) espera distanciarse de las novelas de terror que escribió bajo el pseudónimo de George Stark. Pero cuando urde el plan para asesinar a Stark, descubre que su alter ego ha iniciado una espeluznante búsqueda de venganza.

programme.title: Presencias del más allá
programme.desc: Tras más de cien años en actividad, la posada Yankee Pedlar Inn está por cerrar sus puertas. Los empleados que quedan están decididos a demostrar que se trata de uno de los hoteles más embrujados de Nueva Inglaterra.

programme.title: De fiesta en las alturas
programme.desc: Un elenco estelar, que incluye a Tom Arnold, Kevin Hart, Method Man y Snoop Dogg se apodera de los cielos en esta irreverente comedia sobre una aerolínea que ofrece sensuales sobrecargos, casino y el antro de moda a ¡10,000 metros de altura!

programme.title: Alumno encubierto
programme.desc: Un joven detective se infiltra en una escuela privada de élite para destruir una red internacional dedicada al robo de autos.

programme.title: ¿Qué más podría pasar?
programme.desc: Un millonario y despiadado hombre de negocios le roba a un ladrón profesional un apreciado anillo de la suerte. El ladrón hará todo lo posible por recuperarlo y el millonario por evitarlo.

programme.title: El Loco Superdotado
programme.desc: El constantemente pobre Darryl se arriesga a perder su trabajo soñado en Wall Street hasta que encuentra un experimento que paga bien y que le otorga sentidos superhumanos... y competitividad. Pero con los efectos secundarios, ¡todo puede pasar!

programme.title: Mi difunto novio
programme.desc: Una mujer descubre la verdad sobre su novio después de que lo encuentra muerto en su casa.

programme.title: Una extraña pareja, otra vez
programme.desc: Oscar Madison y Félix Ungar son invitados a la boda de sus hijos Brucey y Hannah, respectivamente. Por lo que deciden viajar juntos a Los Angeles para llegar a la boda de sus hijos. Pero a pesar del tiempo siguen siendo una extraña pareja.

programme.title: La chica de rojo
programme.desc: Cuando Teddy se cruza con una mujer que usa un provocativo vestido de seda rojo, descubre que ella es la modelo elegida por su agencia para una nueva campaña. Desde entonces, el sueño de Teddy será tener un romance con ella.

programme.title: Buffalo Bill and the Indians
programme.desc: Buffalo Bill has fought Indians & Civil War battles, but nothing can prepare him for show business! When he signs Sitting Bull for a role in his Wild West Show, the clash of cultures reverberates far beyond the boundaries of their sprawling theater.

programme.title: Doc

programme.title: Vera Cruz
programme.desc: In this epic Western, two shady mercenaries (Gary Cooper, Burt Lancaster) in Mexico during the 1866 revolution are hired to escort a Countess and her gold to the Mexican army in Vera Cruz and find themselves at odds with the army…and each other!

programme.title: Quigley Down Under

programme.desc: Mike and Gloria go away for eight days to spend some time in a commune. Archie and Edith settle down for a quiet game of cards but when she lets him win, Archie insults her and they get into a big fight.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: When Sgt. Lonnie Jamison picks up Jana Craven and her friends for cutting school, a simple truancy bust turns into a complicated murder case for the Sparta police involving the disappearance of Jana's mother, Colleen, and her abusive father, Frank.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Someone mysteriously leaves a baby on Lieutenant Bubba Skinner's doorstep. When the Sparta police search for the mother, they uncover a car submerged in a lake and the dead body of the baby's mother inside, but who and where is the baby's father?

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: The roommate of a slain police officer agrees to be bait in a rape investigation. After Mike Stone kicks her off the case, she continues on her own, hurtling headlong into peril.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A retired hit man returns to San Francisco, not knowing that he will be the target of a hit.

programme.title: Mannix

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A one-hour special that looks back at 2006, one of Dog's most tumultuous years, which has included the passing of Beth's father, Dog and Beth's wedding, the tragic death of Dog's daughter Barbara.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Lyssa points out that the fugitive in the next case has the same birth date as Barbara, Dog's recently deceased daughter, the team takes a special vow to capture the young woman.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog shows his love of justice and children in this poignant episode. He begins by giving encouragement to a group of handicapped children, then starting the search for Jacob, a fugitive who's abandoned his wife and children.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the boys are going after a fugitive with a $25,000 bond and a string of theft charges behind him. When the team hits his apartment, they find a boot print on the door, a souvenir of a police raid from only days earlier?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfing hero is on a wave to nowhere, and it's Dog's turn to play lifeguard. "Buttons," known throughout the islands for his prowess on the waves and his daring 360's, has wiped-out on the rocky shoals of drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kristine had a string of gambling and forgery charges before she jumped bail, leaving Dog "holding the bag". Now it's time for Dog to call in some chits of his own, getting the help of trusty informants he's helped out over the years

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog told him not to go, but Charles went anyway, skipping to Oregon against the terms of his bail. Now Dog has a tip that Charles plans to slip back into Honolulu. With $30,000 on the line Dog knows he can leave little to chance.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The following day is Dog's birthday, but that won't stop him from chasing a fugitive, who is facing firearms charges. Dog doesn't relish the thought of going after an alleged gunslinger on his birthday, but he's never one to avoid a challenge.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth have to be at the state capitol bright and early to receive an award for their fight against ice in Hawaii. Afterwards, they're inspired to start the hunt for Shanna, an alleged ice user and identity thief with $80,000 in bonds.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth calls a client, Daphne, whose bond they have to revoke and makes a shocking discovery: Daphne's cosigner on her bond and ex-boyfriend, Bobby, has just committed suicide.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After meeting with the cosigner on a bond for a man named John, Dog and the Posse hatch a plan to lure him to a high rise apartment. But when night falls, their plan leaves a member of the team alone and in harm's way!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Roger has 27 prior arrests, spent years in jail and doesn't want to go back. But he's missed court and now Dog has to bring him in. To complicate matters, this fugitive lives in a tightly-knit community, where good information won't come easy.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kolani's on the run, left his wife to look after four kids, and left Dog holding the bag for the $10k bond. So their pursuit of this case takes them into some parts of Oahu, and the human heart, that few of us will ever see.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today the crew is hunting for Holly, a car thief. She's one of Tim's bonds, and the entire Dog crew knows that means trouble--or at least a long and difficult chase.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is tracking down Cecilia, who's wanted for car theft, but she's nowhere to be found. Her girlfriend and co-signer has gone missing too. Just when the trail goes cold, a friend leads the team to the cosigner's empty apartment.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Marisa descubre al farsante de Víctor, pero Lalo quiere que le dé una segunda oportunidad. Catalina y Estanislao se enfrentan. Sara se sale con la suya, pero desconoce que Marisa podría regresar a trabajar al hotel. Marcela llega a Nueva York.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: A los gemelos les pasa algo que los impresiona. Sebastián y los empleados rodean la finca, no van a suspender el rastreo, el teniente Ríos cree que Alicia está detrás de todo.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia se ve en aprietos y recibe ayuda de quien menos espera, todos quedan sorprendidos con sus palabras. Hayde descubre anormalidades en la fábrica y se enfrenta al sospechoso.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Sebastián busca a Alicia con otras intenciones, Justino le habla claro a su protegida. Laurentino y su hija no pierden tiempo, visitan a Perfecta con su versión de los hechos en los negocios.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia protege a Hayde en el pueblo, mientras a Perfecta la perturban las dudas, toma determinaciones. Sebastián defiende a su hermana, cuando la honestidad de Laurentino pende de un hilo.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Alba le cuenta la verdad a Esther sobre los padres de Victoria. Teresa Cristina ordena la ejecución de Antonio y le exige a Fernando pruebas de su muerte. Griselda tiene un mal presentimiento y Patricia recibe una llamada que la deja en shock.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Antonio sobrevive y Griselda se lo comunica a Teresa Cristina, advirtiéndole que la hundirá en la cárcel. Beatriz acosa a Esther. Reinaldo ve el cartel de la presunta rubia asesina. Teresa Cristina quiere que Fernando termine el trabajo con Antonio.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Griselda impide que el secuaz de Fernando remate a Antonio en el hospital. Reinaldo rechaza a Teresa Cristina y ella se va a buscar a José. Griselda teme ahora por Kikito y contrata un guardaespaldas. Beatriz amenaza a Esther con quitarle a Victoria.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Reinaldo y Teresa Cristina discuten y ella amenaza con matarlo. Reinaldo se presenta en la comisaría para presentar una denuncia. Gabriel le cuenta a Juan Pablo lo que pasa con Esther y su hija. José le dice a Teresa Cristina que perdió el deseo por ella.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Marisa descubre al farsante de Víctor, pero Lalo quiere que le dé una segunda oportunidad. Catalina y Estanislao se enfrentan. Sara se sale con la suya, pero desconoce que Marisa podría regresar a trabajar al hotel. Marcela llega a Nueva York.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex is so sure that he will be named valedictorian of his class that he can't cope with the thought of being defeated by a girl-especially his girl.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex courts disaster when he invites two dates to the senior prom. He devises an elaborate scheme for escorting each of the unknowing girls on a night to remember.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When Alex's pal Skippy discovers he's adopted, Alex helps him cope with the shocking news.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When Elyse has a convention speech in 'fascinating east coast resort' Atlantic City, she didn't plan to waste any time and money gambling.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory's enthusiasm for her part-time job at a boutique causes her grades to slip even lower than usual.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Steven and Elyse plan a nostalgic weekend with the kids before the baby arrives, and are crushed to discover that the children are not at all interested in reminiscing about old times-they'd rather be with their friends.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex is thrilled to be taking a college course taught by one of his personal heroes, Professor Ephraim Bronski. In his eagerness to impress the teacher he gets off to a bad start and is humiliated by his idol when he fails the first-class assignment.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex cannot accept the fact that he and everyone around him are growing up and desperately clings to his old ways.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex reluctantly accepts a part-time job with his father at the non-profit station, and his dad is bursting with pride to have him following in his footsteps.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex plays Cupid to help his shy pal Skippy get together with Jane, the girl of his dreams, but his good intentions go awry when the girl falls for him instead.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Little Jennifer is thrilled about getting a visit from her former neighborhood pal, Scott, whom she hasn't seen in five years.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: As an economics student, Alex finds it demeaning to be forced into a public service position, but his experiences at the crisis center give him a new outlook on life.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Steven gets depressed from interviewing frightfully inept candidates as housekeeper-nanny for the baby, such as a child-hater ad an ex-con.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: While Steven and Elyse are away on vacation, Mallory accidentally crashes her parents' car into a telephone pole. The kids need to raise money for auto repairs and decides to turn the Keaton house into a hotel.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex's chances for acceptance into a smug college fraternity are dependent upon him having a knockout date for the pledge dance.

programme.title: Family Ties
